title: COPD patients with wheezing: 11 natural herbal creams

remedies.remedy_desc: Eucalyptus globulus creams are a popular remedy for wheezing, and they work by loosening and thinning mucus in the lungs, making it easier to cough up. The active compounds in Eucalyptus globulus, such as eucalyptol and cineole, have natural anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties that help to reduce swelling and congestion in the airways. This allows for easier breathing and relief from wheezing. When using Eucalyptus globulus creams, apply a thin layer to your chest and throat, and gently massage it in. Take slow, deep breaths to help the vapors from the cream open up your airways. You may start to feel relief from wheezing within 15-30 minutes, and the symptoms should improve over the next few hours. However, if your wheezing persists or worsens, consult with your doctor for proper medical attention.
remedies.image_alt: Eucalyptus globulus herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Thymus vulgaris creams are often used to help alleviate wheezing issues. The creams contain properties from the thyme plant, which is rich in compounds like carvacrol and thymol. These constituents have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help soothe the airways and reduce wheezing. When you apply Thymus vulgaris creams to your chest or nose, the thymol and carvacrol can help calm the bronchial tubes and reduce inflammation, making it easier to breathe. To use the cream effectively, apply a thin layer to your chest or nose 2-3 times a day, as needed. As the thyme properties start to work, you may notice a reduction in wheezing and coughing, and an improvement in your breathing. However, it's essential to note that Thymus vulgaris creams may interact with other medications, such as blood thinners, and may not be suitable for people with certain health conditions, like high blood pressure. If you're considering using Thymus vulgaris creams for wheezing, consult with a healthcare professional to determine the best course of action for your specific needs.
remedies.image_alt: Thymus vulgaris herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Rosmarinus officinalis creams, also known as rosemary creams, contain compounds that may help alleviate wheezing. The creams typically contain carnosic acid, a potent antioxidant that has anti-inflammatory properties. This is important because wheezing often occurs when airways become inflamed and swollen. The anti-inflammatory properties of carnosic acid may help reduce swelling and inflammation, making it easier to breathe. Rosemary creams may also contain rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to relax airway muscles and improve lung function.  If you experience wheezing, you can try applying a rosemary cream to your chest or inhaling its vapors. To do this, heat the cream by placing the jar in a bowl of hot water or using a warm compress. Then, gently rub the cream onto your chest or inhale the vapors.  When you use rosemary creams for wheezing, you may experience a reduction in symptoms, such as less frequent or severe wheezing attacks. Your breathing may become easier, and you may feel more comfortable. However, it's essential to note that rosemary creams are not a substitute for medical treatment. If you have a persistent or severe case of wheezing, you should consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis and treatment.
remedies.image_alt: Rosmarinus officinalis herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Echinacea purpurea creams are a herbal remedy that may help alleviate wheezing symptoms. This is because Echinacea purpurea contains compounds like alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antihistamine properties. These properties help reduce inflammation and congestion in the airways, making it easier to breathe. Specifically, the alkylamides in Echinacea purpurea have been shown to relax bronchial muscles and decrease the production of histamine, a chemical that can trigger wheezing.  If you're considering using Echinacea purpurea creams for wheezing, start by consulting with a healthcare professional to ensure it's safe for you to use, especially if you're already taking medication or have a severe respiratory condition. When using the cream, apply a small amount to your chest or nose 2-3 times a day, and gently massage it in. It's also essential to use the cream as directed and follow the recommended dosage to avoid any adverse effects. When using Echinacea purpurea creams for wheezing, you may experience relief from symptoms such as shortness of breath, coughing, and wheezing. Some people may also notice a reduction in the frequency and severity of asthma attacks. However, it's essential to remember that Echinacea purpurea creams are not a substitute for conventional medical treatment, and you should continue to follow your doctor's advice and treatment plan. Additionally, if your symptoms worsen or you experience any side effects, discontinue use and consult with your healthcare professional.
remedies.image_alt: Echinacea purpurea herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Mentha x piperita creams, also known as peppermint creams, can help alleviate wheezing by providing quick relief from congestion and inflammation in the airways. The creams contain menthol, a key constituent that helps to thin mucus and ease breathing. When applied topically to the chest or nose, menthol stimulates the nerves that control breathing, helping to relax airway muscles and increase airflow. The creams also contain eucalyptus oil, which has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce swelling and irritation in the airways. To use peppermint creams for wheezing, apply a small amount to your chest or nose as needed, taking care not to inhale the cream directly. You can also inhale the vapors from a hot shower or bath while applying the cream to enhance its effects. Likely outcomes include reduced wheezing and congestion, making it easier to breathe and relax.
remedies.image_alt: Mentha x piperita herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams have been used traditionally to help with wheezing due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The creams contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe. They also contain other constituents like flavonoids and saponins, which have antioxidant and soothing effects, further aiding in relieving wheezing symptoms. If you're considering using Glycyrrhiza glabra creams for wheezing, take the following steps: apply a small amount of cream to the chest and inhale deeply, repeating this process 2-3 times a day. It's essential to follow the product's instructions and start with a small dose to gauge your body's response. If you experience any discomfort or worsening of symptoms, discontinue use and consult with a healthcare professional. When using Glycyrrhiza glabra creams for wheezing, you can expect the following outcomes: a reduction in wheezing symptoms, improved lung function, and increased ease of breathing. You may also notice a decrease in coughing and a general feeling of relief from congestion. However, it's crucial to note that these creams are not a substitute for medical treatment, and if your wheezing persists or worsens, you should seek medical attention to rule out any underlying conditions that require professional attention.
remedies.image_alt: Glycyrrhiza glabra herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Salvia officinalis creams may help with wheezing due to the presence of certain compounds like thymol, carnosic acid, and ursolic acid. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation in the airways and alleviate wheezing symptoms. Thymol, in particular, is known for its bronchodilatory effects, meaning it can help relax and widen airway muscles, making it easier to breathe. If you're considering using Salvia officinalis creams for wheezing, it's recommended to consult with a healthcare professional first, especially if you're already taking medications or have underlying health conditions. Once you've got the green light, you can try applying the cream topically to your chest or throat area, following the instructions provided. Start with a small amount and gradually increase as needed. When you use Salvia officinalis creams for wheezing, you may experience a reduction in wheezing symptoms, such as shortness of breath or coughing. You may also notice improved respiratory function and reduced inflammation in the airways. However, it's essential to note that results may vary, and individual responses to the cream may differ. Some people may experience no change or even an increase in symptoms. If you experience any adverse effects or concerns, discontinue use and consult with a healthcare professional.
remedies.image_alt: Salvia officinalis herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Cymbopogon citratus creams, also known as lemongrass creams, have been used to help alleviate wheezing due to their anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory properties. The creams contain compounds like citral, geraniol, and limonene, which are responsible for their therapeutic effects. When applied topically, these creams can help relax airway muscles and reduce inflammation, making it easier to breathe. If you're experiencing wheezing, try applying a small amount of lemongrass cream to your chest or neck area. Gently rub it in until it's fully absorbed. You can also inhale the steam from a bowl of hot water with a few drops of lemongrass essential oil added to it for 5-10 minutes, 2-3 times a day.  When used regularly, lemongrass creams may help reduce the frequency and severity of wheezing episodes. You may notice an improvement in your breathing within a few days to a week of consistent use. However, if your wheezing persists or worsens, consult with a healthcare professional for proper evaluation and treatment.
remedies.image_alt: Cymbopogon citratus herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Ocimum basilicum creams, also known as basil creams, have been traditionally used to help alleviate wheezing and respiratory issues. The key properties and constituents of basil creams that contribute to their benefits include its high content of antioxidants, such as eugenol and linalool, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm the airways. The essential oils present in basil creams, including camphor and pinene, also help to relax the muscles in the airways and improve breathing.  If you are experiencing wheezing, you can try applying a small amount of Ocimum basilicum cream to your chest or inhaling its vapors using a diffuser. To do this, gently massage a small amount of the cream onto your chest in a circular motion, making sure to avoid the eyes and mouth. You can also inhale the vapors from the cream by placing a few drops on a handkerchief or cloth and inhaling the scent.  By taking these actions, you may start to feel relief from wheezing within a few minutes. Your breathing may become easier and more relaxed, and you may experience a reduction in the frequency and severity of wheezing episodes. As the anti-inflammatory properties of the essential oils in the cream take effect, you may also notice an improvement in your overall respiratory health.
remedies.image_alt: Ocimum basilicum herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Lavandula angustifolia creams contain a compound called linalool, which is known to have anti-inflammatory properties. This means it can help reduce swelling and ease congestion in the airways, making it easier to breathe. The cream also contains linalyl acetate, a compound that has a calming effect on the body, which can help to relax the muscles in the chest and make it easier to breathe.  If you're experiencing wheezing, try applying a small amount of Lavandula angustifolia cream to your chest or nose before bedtime. This can help to calm your airways and improve your breathing. You can also try inhaling the vapors from the cream by gently heating it in a bowl of hot water and then inhaling the steam.  When you start using the cream, you may notice a reduction in wheezing and coughing within a few days. Your airways may become less inflamed, and you may be able to breathe more easily. It's also possible that you may be able to sleep better and feel more relaxed, thanks to the calming effects of the linalyl acetate.
remedies.image_alt: Lavandula angustifolia herbal creams for wheezing

remedies.remedy_desc: Hyptis suaveolens creams are a natural remedy that may help alleviate wheezing symptoms. The creams contain compounds like linalool and eugenol, which have anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory properties. These properties can help relax the airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing wheezing. When using Hyptis suaveolens creams for wheezing, apply a thin layer to your chest or back, as needed, up to 3-4 times a day. It's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any new treatment, especially if you have a severe respiratory condition or are taking medications. If you experience relief, you may notice improved breathing, reduced wheezing episodes, and increased energy levels. However, if your symptoms worsen or persist, seek medical attention promptly.
remedies.image_alt: Hyptis suaveolens herbal creams for wheezing

intro_desc: People with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) often experience wheezing, which is a high-pitched sound while breathing out. This happens because of inflammation and constriction in the airways, making it hard for air to pass through. Wheezing can be uncomfortable and disrupt daily life. It can make simple tasks like walking or talking difficult, and even cause sleep problems. Wheezing can also trigger anxiety and stress in COPD patients, making it a challenge to manage their condition. When wheezing is severe, it can lead to shortness of breath, chest tightness, and fatigue, which can further limit a person's ability to engage in daily activities.  COPD patients may try various treatments to manage wheezing, such as medications, inhalers, and lifestyle changes. However, some may find these treatments not effective enough. This is where herbal creams can be considered. These creams are made with plant extracts that have anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory properties, helping to relax the airways and reduce inflammation. They can be applied topically to the chest area to provide quick relief from wheezing. Some people find that using herbal creams in combination with other treatments helps to reduce wheezing episodes and improve their overall quality of life.
